top_trust_concerns.trust_concern: I would need clearer proof on privacy and data boundaries.

observations: The concept appears to depend on personal or workflow data, so trust language and data-minimisation choices will materially affect adoption.
recommended_validation_questions: Which minimum data fields are truly necessary for the first useful experience?

observations: Some personas signal trust concerns that should be reported as design risks rather than as fixed segment truths.
recommended_validation_questions: Which trust concerns repeat across real user interviews, and how should the product present those trade-offs?

audit_categories.observation: The concept appears to depend on personal or workflow data, so trust language and data-minimisation choices will materially affect adoption.
audit_categories.recommended_validation_question: Which minimum data fields are truly necessary for the first useful experience?

audit_categories.observation: Some personas signal trust concerns that should be reported as design risks rather than as fixed segment truths.
audit_categories.recommended_validation_question: Which trust concerns repeat across real user interviews, and how should the product present those trade-offs?

skeptic_review.summary: Skeptic review focuses on weak proof, habit-change friction, pricing readiness, and value-capture gaps.

challenged_assumptions.title: Solution story may still be too abstract
challenged_assumptions.observation: The proposed workflow benefit still looks conditional on execution details that the current pitch does not yet prove.
challenged_assumptions.recommended_validation_question: Which exact before-and-after workflow improvement can the founder demonstrate in a short trial?

challenged_assumptions.title: Pricing may be ahead of proven value
challenged_assumptions.observation: A meaningful slice of the current panel does not yet show enough willingness to pay at the proposed stage.
challenged_assumptions.recommended_validation_question: What proof or trial experience would make the initial price feel justified within the first week?
